data.name: Sexdew City
data.detailed_description:
Passion project, not just another collection of reused animations where you press a button from time to time.

-no mandatory relationships. Date only the girls you like

-depth and actual choices. Every girl has at least 2 routes. Most of them have double that!

-18 main girls + a few secondary ones. Create a harem or chose just one. It is all up to you. Choosing to have sex with one or refusing another can have positive/ negative effects but the point is you always have the option to chose

-become a baller with a big mansion filled with chicks and an expensive car, a wagie who ends up getting the girl of his dreams or anything in between

-a few minigames to keep the game interesting and add actual gameplay

-the demo has over 50 sex scenes in this early stage and the full game aims for hundreds

-a mysterious main story that takes different playthroughs to unveil fully but can also be completely ignored if your interest lies elsewhere

-the main story has 3 endings all of which will then branch into 2 different outcomes for the rest of the game depending on your choices

-many fetishes like: harem, marriage, impregnation, cheating, blackmail, hypnosis, sleeping sex, free use, milfs, muscle woman, teacher, goth, tall girls,  short girls and so on.

All of them are optional. Choose only the routes you want. Just make sure you are a decent enough person to not get into bad scenarios if you don't want them.

data.short_description: Choices matter, 18 main girls + a few extras, many routes for each of them, actual gameplay, many unique sex scenes, have relationships only with the girls you like or with all of them.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard
